## Changes

Summarize the main changes in this PR in a few concise bullets. Focus on what changed in behavior, APIs, or structure rather than implementation details.

## Relevant links

Link related issues, PRs, design notes, or discussions that provide context. Include `Fixes #...` / `Closes #...` when this PR resolves an issue.

## Reasoning

Explain the motivation for this PR: what problem it solves, what gap it addresses, and why this work is needed now.

## Explanation

Describe key implementation choices, trade-offs, and alternatives considered. Call out any assumptions or constraints reviewers should know.

## Additional notes

Mention future work and limitations

## Checklist

- [ ] Introduces breaking changes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] Updated documentation/comments where needed
